subject: fix(icons): center chat bubble in SVG and regenerate all PNGs
body:
The chat bubble composition was offset from the SVG center — shifted 20px
right and 70px down. Added a centering group transform to align the combined
bounding box of both bubbles at the SVG midpoint (512, 512). Regenerated
all 7 PNG icons + public SVG copy via generate-icons.mjs.

Tags: icons, ui, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: uniwind-migration
Semver: patch

title: center chat bubble in SVG and regenerate all PNGs
